data.body:
[Event Update Notice]

The new event "-ive aLIVE!" has begun!
Watch the After-School Sweets Club dedicate their souls to band activities as they try to secure Frederica Semla, the crown jewel of all desserts!

⬇️Promotional Video (HD)⬇️
